caption: A middle-aged man with a bald head and a gray beard, wearing a gray polo shirt, speaks directly to the camera. He is positioned in front of a white wall featuring a poster with the logo "ALPHASZENSZOR" and the heading "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes." The poster contains various bullet points, a circular diagram with images, and small photos of equipment. In the background, labels "ZB38 AlphaSzenszor Inc." and "ZB39 DexM" are visible on a white panel. As the video progresses, the man's facial expressions shift; he begins with a relatively neutral expression while speaking, then opens his eyes wider and raises his eyebrows in a look of surprise or emphasis. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a close-up shot of the man's head and shoulders throughout the sequence.
